ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "year_quarter_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the years and quarters table */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sectors table */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the indicator categories table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES indicator_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_year_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_quarter_id") REFERENCES years_and_quarters ("year_quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years_and_quarters" (
  "year_quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year and quarter */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the years table */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the quarters table */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year name (e.g., 2000, 2001) */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Quarter name (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_years_and_quarters_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_years_and_quarters_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Finance, Manufacturing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., GDP, Inflation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., M, IS, ES, DD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator entry */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES indicator_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, economist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year name (e.g., 2000, 2001) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Quarter name (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, economist, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
